name: Eggless Zucchini Fritters
tagline: Crisp shredded-zucchini fritters bound with chickpea flour, no eggs

hero.alt: Stack of golden zucchini fritters with yogurt dip
hero.caption: fritters — golden, crisp

steps.title: Shred and squeeze
steps.detail: Shred zucchini on the large holes of a box grater. Salt with 1 tsp salt; rest 10 min in a colander, then squeeze hard in a clean towel.
steps.tip: Volume should drop by half. Wet zucchini = soggy fritter.

steps.title: Mix the batter
steps.detail: Combine zucchini with chickpea flour, scallions, garlic, dill, cumin, salt. Stir — should hold together when scooped.
steps.tip: Add a tablespoon of water if it's too dry; another tablespoon flour if it's too wet.

steps.title: Fry in batches
steps.detail: Heat 1/4 inch olive oil in a skillet over medium. Drop heaping tablespoons in, flatten gently. Fry 3 min per side until deep gold.
steps.tip: Don't crowd — cooks evenly only with space.

steps.title: Drain and serve
steps.detail: Transfer to a paper-towel-lined rack. Salt while hot. Serve with yogurt or tahini dip.

healthFacts: No eggs — chickpea flour binds and adds plant protein.
Squeezing the zucchini dry is the difference between fritter and pancake.
Chickpea flour adds ~6g protein per 1/4 cup.
